tweet: shipped polly v2. rewrote internals in rust for speed, and dropped the sycophancy so she stops agreeing with your bad code. nanobanana now actually respects `safe=false`, and we hardened the tier system to stop bots farming pollen. 7 PRs merged today.
alt_tweet: 7 PRs merged. polly v2 is live with native-speed internals and zero sycophancy. she will no longer pretend your bad ideas are good. also fixed nanobanana to actually respect `safe=false` and patched the tier system against bot farming.

reasoning: Highlights the most impactful technical changes (Rust internals, safe=false fix, bot prevention) with dry humor about AI sycophancy.
